project.title: Me sentaron con los meseros en la boda de mi hijo - Parte 4
project.subtitle: Los tres informes
project.hook: Once anos me toco la silla de atras. Ese lunes le toco a ella.

sentada_cuarto.prompt: Same character Bok-ja, same face and short greying permed hair, plain grey blouse without the coat, seated cross-legged on the floor beside a low wooden table, upright posture, both hands resting open on her knees, tired unguarded expression, neutral studio background.

arrodillado.prompt: Same character Ji-hoon, same face and short neat black hair, same white dress shirt with the sleeves rolled, kneeling on both knees on a bare floor, back curved forward, both hands flat on his own thighs, head lowered, devastated expression, neutral studio background.

Single thick cream gala invitation card with a gold embossed border and a small hotel crest, lying on a dark surface, no readable text, neutral background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.

Silencio total cuando cae de rodillas
